spec.description: Observability dashboard for the Tuist Kura cache mesh.

panels.description: 1 = up, 0 = down per selected instance.

targets.expr: up{job="kura", cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance", pod=~"kura-(${tenant})-.*"}

panels.title: Scrape Status

panels.description: Total HTTP requests per second across selected instances.

targets.expr: sum((rate(kura_http_requests_total_total{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance", route!~"/_internal/.*|/up|/ready|/status/rollout|/metrics|/_unmatched"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"}))

panels.title: Request Rate

panels.description: HTTP 5xx responses per second.

targets.expr: sum((rate(kura_http_requests_total_total{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance", route!~"/_internal/.*|/up|/ready|/status/rollout|/metrics|/_unmatched", status=~"5.."}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"}))

panels.title: Error Rate (5xx)

panels.description: 95th-percentile request duration across selected instances.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) ((rate(kura_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})))

panels.title: p95 HTTP Latency

panels.description: Per-instance request throughput over time.

targets.expr: sum by (pod) ((rate(kura_http_requests_total_total{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance", route!~"/_internal/.*|/up|/ready|/status/rollout|/metrics|/_unmatched"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"}))

panels.title: HTTP Request Rate by Instance

panels.description: Top 10 routes by request rate.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (route) ((rate(kura_http_requests_total_total{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance", route!~"/_internal/.*|/up|/ready|/status/rollout|/metrics|/_unmatched", route=~"$route"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})))

panels.title: HTTP Request Rate by Route

panels.description: Request rate grouped by HTTP status code.

targets.expr: sum by (status) ((rate(kura_http_requests_total_total{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance", route!~"/_internal/.*|/up|/ready|/status/rollout|/metrics|/_unmatched", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"}))

panels.title: HTTP Status Rate

panels.description: Request duration percentiles aggregated across selected instances.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) ((rate(kura_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) ((rate(kura_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) ((rate(kura_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})))

panels.title: HTTP Latency p50 / p95 / p99

panels.description: Artifact read operations per second by result label.

targets.expr: sum by (result) ((rate(kura_artifact_reads_total_total{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"}))

panels.title: Artifact Reads by Result

panels.description: Artifact write operations per second by result label.

targets.expr: sum by (result) ((rate(kura_artifact_writes_total_total{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})) or on() label_replace(vector(0), "result", "no_writes", "__name__", ".*")

panels.title: Artifact Writes by Result

panels.description: Read rate broken down by producer.

targets.expr: sum by (producer) ((rate(kura_artifact_reads_total_total{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"}))

panels.title: Artifact Reads by Producer

panels.description: Write rate broken down by producer.

targets.expr: sum by (producer) ((rate(kura_artifact_writes_total_total{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})) or on() label_replace(vector(0), "producer", "no_writes", "__name__", ".*")

panels.title: Artifact Writes by Producer

panels.description: Receiver and bootstrap apply operations per second grouped by outcome and instance.

targets.expr: sum by (outcome, pod) ((rate(kura_replication_apply_results_total_total{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"}))

panels.title: Replication Applies by Outcome

panels.description: Outbound outbox replication request round-trip latency percentiles.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) ((rate(kura_replication_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"}))) or on() vector(0)

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) ((rate(kura_replication_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"}))) or on() vector(0)

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) ((rate(kura_replication_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"}))) or on() vector(0)

panels.title: Outbound Replication Latency p50 / p95 / p99

panels.description: Traffic to internal peer replication routes grouped by instance, route, and status.

targets.expr: sum by (pod, route, status) ((rate(kura_http_requests_total_total{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance", route=~"/_internal/.*"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"}))

panels.title: Internal / Peer Route Traffic

panels.description: RocksDB block cache usage, pinned usage, and total capacity per instance.

targets.expr: kura_rocksdb_block_cache_usage_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"} and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})

kura_rocksdb_block_cache_pinned_usage_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"} and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})

kura_rocksdb_block_cache_capacity_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"} and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})

panels.title: RocksDB Block Cache Usage

panels.description: RocksDB write buffer usage versus capacity.

targets.expr: kura_rocksdb_write_buffer_usage_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"} and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})

kura_rocksdb_write_buffer_capacity_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"} and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})

panels.title: RocksDB Write Buffer Usage

panels.description: Block cache fill ratio. Values approaching 1.0 mean the cache is full.

targets.expr: sort_desc(max by (pod) ((kura_rocksdb_block_cache_usage_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"} / kura_rocksdb_block_cache_capacity_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})))

panels.title: Block Cache Utilization

panels.description: Write buffer fill ratio. High values signal write pressure.

targets.expr: sort_desc(max by (pod) ((kura_rocksdb_write_buffer_usage_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"} / kura_rocksdb_write_buffer_capacity_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})))

panels.title: Write Buffer Utilization

panels.description: CPU cores consumed per kura pod. No CPU limits are set, so absolute cores are shown.

targets.expr: sum by (pod) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace="kura", container="kura", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"kura-(${tenant})-.*"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: CPU Usage

panels.description: Memory working set as % of configured limit per kura pod.

targets.expr: sum by (pod) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace="kura", container="kura", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"kura-(${tenant})-.*"}) / sum by (pod) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace="kura", container="kura", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"kura-(${tenant})-.*", resource="memory"})

panels.title: Memory Usage

panels.description: Total disk reads + writes bytes per second per kura pod.

targets.expr: sum by (pod) (rate(container_fs_reads_bytes_total{namespace="kura", container="kura", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"kura-(${tenant})-.*"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(container_fs_writes_bytes_total{namespace="kura", container="kura", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"kura-(${tenant})-.*"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Disk I/O

panels.description: Network bytes received and transmitted per selected instance, excluding loopback.

targets.expr: sum by (pod) (rate(container_network_receive_bytes_total{namespace="kura", pod=~"kura-(${tenant})-.*", cluster=~"$cluster"}[$__rate_interval]))
sum by (pod) (rate(container_network_transmit_bytes_total{namespace="kura", pod=~"kura-(${tenant})-.*", cluster=~"$cluster"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Network Throughput

panels.description: Cumulative container restarts per kura pod - spikes indicate crashes or OOM kills.

targets.expr: sum by (pod) (kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total{namespace="kura", container="kura", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"kura-(${tenant})-.*"})

panels.title: Container Restarts

panels.description: Recent Kura cache endpoint traces from mesh nodes. Internal health checks and scrape traffic are intentionally excluded.
panels.title: Cache Endpoint Traces

panels.description: Structured Kura runtime logs from selected Kura containers.

targets.expr: {cluster=~"$cluster", namespace="kura", container="kura", pod=~"$pod"} |~ "\"kura\\.tenant_id\":\"($tenant)\"" | json

panels.title: Kura Logs

panels.description: Server locations (blue squares) and request traffic volume (amber bubbles sized by req/s) on the same map. Fly.io-style: infrastructure markers sit on top of load bubbles.

targets.expr:
sum by (region) (
  sum by (pod) (rate(kura_http_requests_total_total{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant"}[5m]))
  * on (pod) group_left(region) max by (pod, region) (kura_node_geo_info)
) or sum by (region) (max by (pod, region) (kura_node_geo_info) * 0)

targets.expression:
SELECT __value__ AS Value, region,
  CASE region
    WHEN 'us-east'    THEN 37.926868
    WHEN 'us-west'    THEN 45.523064
    WHEN 'eu-central' THEN 50.110922
    ELSE 0
  END AS lat,
  CASE region
    WHEN 'us-east'    THEN -77.054743
    WHEN 'us-west'    THEN -122.676483
    WHEN 'eu-central' THEN 8.682127
    ELSE 0
  END AS lon
FROM D LIMIT 10

targets.expr: max by (region) (kura_node_geo_info)

targets.expression:
SELECT region,
  CASE region
    WHEN 'us-east'    THEN 37.926868
    WHEN 'us-west'    THEN 45.523064
    WHEN 'eu-central' THEN 50.110922
    ELSE 0
  END AS lat,
  CASE region
    WHEN 'us-east'    THEN -77.054743
    WHEN 'us-west'    THEN -122.676483
    WHEN 'eu-central' THEN 8.682127
    ELSE 0
  END AS lon
FROM F LIMIT 10

panels.title: Server Regions & Request Traffic

spec.title: Tuist Kura
